scene_palette.style_summary: Soft contemporary bedroom suite featuring warm beige and taupe fabrics, greyish-brown wood cabinetry, and medium-warm oak flooring with subtle brass accents.

floor_material.description: Medium warm brown hardwood planks with natural grain variation, providing a cozy foundation.

wall_material.description: Soft, warm off-white painted walls with a matte finish, enhancing the neutral and airy feel.
